collision_rules.reason: Evidence work owns the request; Writing Quality starts after the evidence-backed draft exists.
verification_needed: Verify source and claim ledgers before the writing handoff.

collision_rules.reason: Decision quality comes before execution design.
verification_needed: Confirm the decision is accepted before the Outcome Engine handoff.

collision_rules.reason: The request is a focused agent audit and explicitly excludes the ProofLoop protocol.
verification_needed: Verify the agent audit evidence surface.

excluded_routes: loopkit:loopkit as primary before the agent contract exists
collision_rules.reason: Reusable agent architecture owns the first decision; LoopKit receives the approved bounded execution contract at handoff.
verification_needed: Verify the agent contract before initializing the LoopKit run.

collision_rules.reason: The prompt benchmark specification is complete and the task now requires comparative runs and selection.
verification_needed: Verify the benchmark specification before running evaluations.

collision_rules.reason: Brand system ownership determines model choice and prompt direction.
verification_needed: Verify the brand brief before generating prompts.

collision_rules.reason: Checked analysis is ready for decision-facing story design, not another analysis pass.
verification_needed: Confirm the analysis validation evidence is present.

collision_rules.reason: Capability maintenance owns the audit; durable knowledge follows after the routing decision is verified.
verification_needed: Validate the capability registry before the continuity handoff.

collision_rules.reason: The requested deliverable is a video built from an existing website.
verification_needed: Verify website capture and final video delivery quality.

plugins.purpose: Plan, check, rewrite, and validate human-facing writing.
composite_triggers: draft and review an executive memo
writing workflow from intent through cleanup

triggers: clean this prose without changing the facts

handoffs: Receive evidence-backed final prose from Knowledge Work Superpowers.
exclusions: Do not own evidence gathering when research is still required.

plugins.purpose: Inventory, route, audit, govern, and verify capabilities across Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex.
composite_triggers: plugin or skill ownership is unclear
inventory and route it
handoffs: Send verified durable knowledge decisions to Continuity Vault.
exclusions: Do not replace a clear domain plugin route.

plugins.purpose: Design, route, and audit reusable agent systems.
composite_triggers: design and audit a reusable agent system
agent architecture tools authority and stops
handoffs: Send approved generic Goal and loop execution contracts to LoopKit.
Use ProofLoop only after an explicit request for learning and quarantined memory.
exclusions: Do not own generic host Goal, loop, resume, verification, or scheduling work.
Do not infer ProofLoop from ordinary agent verification.

plugins.purpose: Design, run, verify, resume, schedule, and diagnose bounded agent loops with durable state on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex.
composite_triggers: design run verify and schedule a bounded agent loop
durable plan act verify loop with state on disk

triggers: turn this into a bounded agent loop

handoffs: Receive approved reusable agent execution contracts from Agent Ops.
exclusions: Do not own reusable agent definitions or agent-system audits.
Do not manufacture a loop when fresh feedback cannot change the next action.

plugins.purpose: Route and produce video from brief through delivery quality checks.
composite_triggers: finished product launch video with captions and delivery checks
video brief from concept through delivery

triggers: turn this website into a video

handoffs: Receive approved brand direction or a website capture as production input.
exclusions: Do not own a web product whose final deliverable is an app or site.

plugins.purpose: Build, redesign, implement, fix, and verify web products.
composite_triggers: web product from brief through implementation and visual qa
build redesign and verify this web app
handoffs: Receive approved brand direction for implementation.
exclusions: Do not own a video deliverable built from a website.

plugins.purpose: Choose model prompt routes, create prompts, migrate prompts, and design prompt benchmarks.
composite_triggers: choose the right model and create then test a production prompt
model family prompt surface and migration path are unclear

triggers: write a gpt-5.6 sol production prompt

handoffs: Send a completed benchmark specification to Model Evaluation Lab for comparative runs or deployment selection.
exclusions: Do not run comparative model evaluations after the benchmark specification is complete.

plugins.purpose: Challenge assumptions, generate options, interview decisions, and synthesize consequential choices.
composite_triggers: consequential decision by challenging assumptions and comparing options
interview options assumptions and synthesis

triggers: challenge the assumptions in this plan

handoffs: Send an accepted decision to Outcome Engine.
exclusions: Do not start execution before a consequential decision is accepted.

plugins.purpose: Build a brand brief, visual system, image model route, prompts, and consistency checks.
composite_triggers: brand world from brief through model choice prompts and consistency checks
brand visual system model choice and implementation handoff

triggers: choose the image model for this brand

handoffs: Send approved brand implementation to Web Product Studio or Video Production Studio.
exclusions: Do not route brand-owned image prompting through the general Model Prompt Lab.

plugins.purpose: Turn market signals into ICPs, narrative, prospect research, outreach drafts, and founder content.
composite_triggers: market signals define the icp build the narrative and draft no-send outreach
founder revenue workflow from signals through content

triggers: turn these signals into an icp

handoffs: Use Writing Quality for final founder-facing prose.
exclusions: Do not send outreach without explicit authorization.

plugins.purpose: Keep durable knowledge findable, promote it to the right layer, graph it, and audit staleness.
composite_triggers: make this knowledge durable and decide where it should live across tasks
knowledge destination is unclear across tasks

triggers: turn these notes into a graph
decide which knowledge layer owns this

handoffs: Receive verified durable knowledge decisions from Capability Operator.
exclusions: Do not treat recall caches as sources of truth.

plugins.purpose: Turn checked analysis into chart messages, executive readouts, and decision-facing production routes.
composite_triggers: checked analysis into a decision-facing story and choose the right format
analysis is ready for executive story production

triggers: audit whether each chart has a clear message

handoffs: Send the approved story to the selected production capability.
exclusions: Do not redo exploratory analysis that already has validation evidence.

plugins.purpose: Plan, run, normalize, compare, and select models from evaluation evidence.
composite_triggers: plan run normalize and select among these model evaluations
comparative model runs and deployment selection
handoffs: Receive a completed benchmark specification from Model Prompt Lab.
exclusions: Do not redesign prompts when the benchmark specification is already complete.

plugins.purpose: Frame, research, analyze, draft, review, and verify substantial evidence-first knowledge work.
composite_triggers: research this systematically and produce an evidence-backed deliverable
complete evidence-first research and writing workflow

triggers: draft only from this evidence ledger
review this deliverable against the evidence
run systematic research on this question
verify this knowledge deliverable before delivery

handoffs: Send final human-facing prose to Writing Quality.
exclusions: Do not own prose cleanup before evidence work is complete.

plugins.purpose: Turn unclear goals into outcome briefs, action slices, evidence-driven delivery, and system improvement.
composite_triggers: fuzzy goal into an outcome brief action slices execution and proof
goal needs brief actions execution and evidence

triggers: execute this approved action slice with evidence
review and improve this system architecture
break this approved outcome brief into action slices
turn this request into an outcome brief

handoffs: Receive an accepted decision from Strategy Room.
exclusions: Do not replace strategy work when the decision itself is unresolved.

plugins.purpose: Run the explicit ProofLoop learning protocol, audit it, or review its quarantined memory.
handoffs: Start only after an explicit request for the ProofLoop protocol.
exclusions: Never infer ProofLoop from ordinary agent, audit, memory, or verification work.
